title: Voskreseniye
writer: Yevgeny Gabrilovich, Mikhail Shvejtser, Lev Tolstoy
actors: Tamara Syomina, Evgeniy Matveev, Pavel Massalsky
plot: Katusha, a country girl, is seduced and abandoned by Prince Nekludov. Nekludov finds himself, years later, on a jury trying the same Katusha for a crime he now realizes his actions drove her to. He follows her to imprisonment in S...
